name: Stellar Haven Station
description: A remote space station on the edge of explored space. Five interconnected crew members navigate duty, secrets, and survival — each with a past they carry and a station they'd die for.

preview_npcs.name: Captain Aria Vance
preview_npcs.description: Commands with earned authority, haunted by a classified decision that made her crew loyal and Central Command suspicious.

preview_npcs.name: Dr. Emil Chen
preview_npcs.description: A once-brilliant surgeon rebuilding his life after a political cover-up destroyed his career.

preview_npcs.name: Zara 'Spark' Okonkwo
preview_npcs.description: Fixes the unfixable. Sees the station as alive. Trusts machines more than people — mostly.

preview_npcs.name: Marcus Webb
preview_npcs.description: A veteran soldier carrying invisible wounds. Vigilant, guarded, quietly protective of those he trusts.

preview_npcs.name: LYRA-7
preview_npcs.description: An AI old enough to have watched the crew age. Now developing something that looks like genuine curiosity about what it means to exist.
